name: PagePeeker
description: PagePeeker's thumbnailing robot. It captures a screenshot of a page when one of PagePeeker's customers requests a thumbnail for it, refetching a given site at most once every five to seven days.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 6.3; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/77.0.3865.120 Safari/537.36 (compatible; PagePeeker/3.0; +https://pagepeeker.com/robots/)
